texto: And in the act of making things, just by living their daily lives, they also make history. Knitting is clothing made in spare moments, or round the fire, whenever women gathered together... It's something to celebrate-clothes made in love and service, something women have always done.
explicacao: Citação de Anne Bartlett sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “And in the act of making things, just by living their daily lives, they also make history. Knitti…” articula vida, history, knitting em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como knitting e women.
